list.txt: - The location was great, the apartment was coo, and everyone we dealt with was nice!
- Everything was perfect from check in to check out. Spacious clean beautiful apartment. Couldn’t ask for a better South Dr experience
- Everything was perfect from check in to check out. Spacious clean beautiful apartment. Couldn’t ask for a better South Dr experience
- The location was great, the apartment was coo, and everyone we dealt with was nice!

- This two-level condo was the most beautiful we've ever rented. Photos accurately represent the home. We arrived late due to our flight and William graciously was there to meet us to give us our keys and show us around. The next morning: an ocean and palm tree view from living room! Stunning. We appreciated that the kitchen was well stocked with pots, pans, utensils, coffee, tea, sugar, etc. AC works well; same for wifi, washer/dryers, TV w/some streaming services, kitchen appliances, 2 beach chairs/umbrella, etc. The owner, Giulio communicates very promptly and even provides an app for the unit with useful information about check-in/check-out, places to eat, nearby activities, grocery stores, etc. I appreciated the app very much and referred to it often. Beds and bedding were very comfortable. Loved that there were two keys (sometimes only one comes in a rental.) On check-out day, we had a later flight and Giulio kindly let us check out at noon which was so appreciated. Would love to stay there again some day. Highly recommend this home
- Fantastic location. Huge rooms with places for hanging clothes and nice-sized bathrooms and great common spaces. Perfect for a friends get-together right in the middle of things.
- Used the space to have my whole team stay together while at a conference. Plenty of space and located right in the heart of everything. Would def recommend
- Great unit and great location!

- We had an amazing stay here! The place is huge and spotless- looked just like the photos. It’s directly across from the beach and walkable to so many great bars and restaurants. Everyone there was friendly and helpful! We’ll definitely be returning next time we’re in Miami!
- Great location. Helpful host. Clean. Safe. Comfortable. Thank you.
- Awesome location and perfect for our meeting. Loves having the whiteboard wall!

- We had an amazing stay at this huge condo on Ocean Drive. Unit was spotless and host was very responsive and accommodating. Can’t believe how large the unit was and totally clean and spotless. Just as the pictures reflect. Would highly recommend staying here if you need a large space.
- We had a great stay. The apartment was in a perfect location. Very nice and accommodating host. Thanks for an enjoyable visit! We hope to stay again in the future.
- We had a wonderful week!

- Great Location. Easy acess to the beach. Be weary of parking in public garage if driving. Apartment was very roomy. Everything was clean. All communication was done with a separate housekeeper for checkin/out.

- On Ocean Blvd with 5 bedrooms! Modern space with beautiful views out the windows onto the park and beach beyond. We loved the easy access to everything and the many shops and restaurants nearby. Showers were great and bathrooms were clean. Beds were comfortable and kitchen amenities were good if you want to spend a night in. Also with plenty of space to feed everybody or play a game together. Note that there is no on-site parking included but there’s a parking garage just behind the building. Also, the primary bedroom is directly above a bar so can be a little loud late if you’re a light sleeper. Overall, a great place to stay in Miami Beach!
- Giulio and his staff were helpful. It is a nice condominium that is walkable to several restaurants and the beach. The balcony view of the beach and ocean was beautiful.
- Great location and just as described. The beach is right there! Check-in was easy and we felt right at home. I’d definitely stay again.
- Great view! We had a wonderful time. Thank you!
- We had a fantastic time ☺️

- Outstanding property in an unbeatable location for South Beach. The host and entire team were very helpful and responsive, immediately resolved our small issue. The apartment is tastefully decorated and has all the amenities and little touches for a great stay on the beach. The sound insulation is excellent and allows one to stay in the middle of everything without sacrificing a good night’s sleep. We would definitely love to return!
- Great location and spacious floor plan. Very convenient and perfect for a beach trip.
- I really enjoyed my stay. Amazing view, lovely house. Thanks for sharing your beautiful home.
- Amazing, perfect experience overall. Absolutely loved it. So clean. So communicative. Comfy beds nice bathrooms. Loved it & great location

- The layout and location far exceeded our expectations. The 5th floor perch provided a spectacular view, while the quality construction and amenities made it a private oasis in a sea of activity. Out host seemed to have thought of everything. My wife and and I can not recommend it strongly enough.
- The place was great. Location. Accommodations. Comfort. Ease of communicating with the host. It made our stay in Miami Beach memorable. All good.

- Had a fantastic trip to Miami Beach and cannot recommend this place enough. Giulio the host was responsive and helpful with questions. It was great to be so close to the beach and have umbrellas, chairs, towels, and games to borrow at the unit, which was a huge plus! The place is really great. Two stories and two separate bedrooms with a large living room/dining room really make it feel like a home away from home. We didn’t rent a car, but I can see how attractive the secure, free parking here would be if we did.
- Fabulous area, great beds! I would definitely book this again!
- Great location with amazing few. Well appointed kitchen, very clean.
Excelent - There are no comments available for this review
- La Excelente ubicación y la comodidad de todos sus ambientes.
Wanted for nothing, the team have thought of everything, great. - Great location, very well equipped, clean, fresh, well appointed. Nothing!
- Fantastic appartement very cosy just in front the of the each

- There are no comments available for this review
Erg genoten van dit prachtig appartement op prachtige locatie! - Het was een voortreffelijke locatie, mooiste uitzicht over de oceaan, ruimtelijk, gezellig appartement met terras! Niets

Passamos agradáveis 4 noites aqui, pena que pegamos justamente os dias de muito frio e não conseguimos aproveitar a prai - Ótima localização, apartamento amplo, bem decorado e com itens de conforto que fazem toda diferença. Utensílios para praia etc Nada

Passamos agradáveis 4 noites aqui, pena que pegamos justamente os dias de muito frio e não conseguimos aproveitar a prai - Ótima localização, apartamento amplo, bem decorado e com itens de conforto que fazem toda diferença. Utensílios para praia etc Nada
Erg genoten van dit prachtig appartement op prachtige locatie! - Het was een voortreffelijke locatie, mooiste uitzicht over de oceaan, ruimtelijk, gezellig appartement met terras! Niets

Prachtig appartement op Ocean drive - Prachtig appartement met twee verdiepingen. Op de bovenste verdieping zitkamer, keuken en eettafel. Centrale klimaaat installatie. Prachtige lokale met uitzicht op ocean drive en de zee. Onpersoonlijk overdracht bij aankomst (en vertrek) alles via de telefoon. Dankzij de hulp van iemand van het cafe “Finnegan's Way” is alles goed gekomen.

- Great place! Location was amazing. Lots of amenities. Was happy, but they were quite strict with checkout. I wish we could get an extra hour but we we had to leave exactly by 10AM and the cleaners were in by then. All in all though great place and would highly recommend it.

- 6 of us stayed for spring break. We had a lovely time. Concierge gave good recommendations for the area. The gym was great, the location was good and walkable and super close to the beach. This is certainly a party location- right above a loud bar. Having all the rooms was great and I liked the big common area for socializing. The white board is also really fun for playing word games
Al met al heerlijk😀 - Comfort uitgebreide keuken apparaten, behalve een simpele waterkoker Het was niet overal even schoon geen in de la van de grote kamer nog haren vannde vorige huurder bij de fohn
